description:
Converge the issue and worker lanes into the first workflow-complete operator loop.

Scope:
- implement the delegate clarify modal
- implement the run clarify modal
- implement the current single-epic run panel/tab
- wire issue-explorer launch points to the clarify modals
- make `/bw:delegate` and `/bw:run` share the same underlying action handlers as the TUI
- keep the run model aligned with the current single-epic backend; do not start a multi-epic redesign here

Primary file lane:
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/tui/delegate-clarify.ts`
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/tui/run-clarify.ts`
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/tui/run-manager.ts`
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/actions/delegate.ts`
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/actions/run.ts`
- targeted dashboard integration/tests

Acceptance criteria:
- selecting a ticket from the issue explorer can open the delegate clarify flow
- selecting an epic can open the run clarify flow
- the run panel shows current single-epic run state, options, and recent cycle summary
- slash-command entry points and TUI entry points use shared handlers
- tests cover modal launches and current-run rendering/state transitions

Parallel-safety note:
- schedule this after the issue-explorer and worker-manager lanes land; it intentionally converges shared dashboard/run wiring.

comments.text: Taking over manual landing recovery. The delegated worker exited cleanly, but the worker was no longer tracked in the registry and its commit (`e4420ab`) was not landed on `feat/bw-tui`. I am reopening the ticket, validating the worktree commit, and landing it manually.

Manual landing recovery complete. The delegated worker had exited cleanly but was no longer tracked in the worker registry, and its worktree commit had not landed on `feat/bw-tui`. I cherry-picked the recovered worker commit onto `feat/bw-tui`, resolved the dashboard merge conflict against the existing worker-manager wiring, and validated the result.

Landed commit: `bcabc2a` (`feat(pi-beadwork-extension): add clarify modals and run panel for sbdpi-wx1.4`)

Validation run:
- `npm run test -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension`
- `npm run typecheck -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension`
- `npm run lint -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension`

Note: the original worker runtime for `sbdpi-wx1.4` never produced `review.log` / `review-handoff.txt`, so this landing was recovered manually from the surviving worktree commit rather than via the normal reviewer/registry flow.

title: Add delegate/run clarify modals and the single-epic run panel
